scenario: A company wants to use the following automation capabilities in its web application: Remote Process Automation; Organization of documents in specific files and folders; Extraction of data from the website and the storage of that data in an Excel file; Automation of User Interface (UI) testing. You need to recommend an appropriate solution.
q: Which Power Automate flow should you recommend?
why: Recommend a desktop flow (Power Automate for desktop / RPA). Desktop flows automate the user interface of websites and desktop applications - they cover Robotic/Remote Process Automation, moving and organizing files and folders, screen-scraping/extracting data from a website into Excel, and automating UI testing. Cloud flows (instant, automated, scheduled) work with connectors/APIs and cannot drive the UI, and a business process flow only guides users through stages of a Dataverse process.
